description: Letter fragment, very damaged and written in a very cursive hand. Dating: probably no earlier than 13th century. Addressing itself to 'sayyidnā' and making some kind of request in addition to offering to fulfill any services on his behalf (ומהמא . . . לעל ישרפנא סיידנא בקצאהא). The postcript on verso is clearer to read. Mentions a certain ʿAmram; possibly a convert (ללגר); Rav Ḥananʾel; commentaries on Shabbat, ʿEruvin, and Giṭṭin (apparently in reference to Rav Ḥananʾel). Merits further examination.
